reviews.review_description: Fun and witty. But very short for a paid game.

I have a feeling that I would really love this game but it crashes every few minutes and restarts my phone. It's very annoying. I haven't even been able to get past the tutorial. Not thrilled with my purchase.

developer_response.body: Hey SirMarkSkywalker, sorry to hear you are having issues with Esper 2, if you could send us an email on info@coatsink.com explaining what exactly causes the crash to the best you can tell, we will look into it and try to help. Thanks

reviews.review_description: I get to the fish tank under water bit and if freezes even If I uninstall and reinstall it doesn't help.

developer_response.body: Hey moshingwithmidgets, sorry to hear you are having issues with Esper 2, if you could send us an email on info@coatsink.com explaining what exactly causes the crash to the best you can tell, we will look into it and try to help. Thanks

reviews.review_description: I loved it very much, I played 3 times now. I would love to have some more!! Will there be Esper3?? Cannot wait!
Need more game like this
Ik loved it and are waiting for Esper 3!!!!

makes great use of the vr headset and TouchPad. was not a huge fan of the story itself but the puzzles were fun and challenging. took me about 3 days to beat the game at around 2 to 3 hours a time. I was stumped once or twice along the way. Story wise with this being a sequel to ESPER I felt like they held my hand through the entire game a lot of time spent learning the physics in game but not so many puzzles to follow those physics. like underwater physics of the sphere floating and the block sinking and then only having a few puzzles that had those physics things like that felt like I was in a tutorial sound mechanics though.
love this game, these test and the scenarios remind me alot of a portal style puzzle. Well it's good work and thank you!!
I have a lot of problems when the blocks or balls become inaccessible. They won't let me pick it up and and I have to restart. Please please fix it! But good game, otherwise.

I loved the story, the voice acting... The environments were beautiful and this was an improvement on the original in that the puzzle was all around not just in front. In the way of puzzle games Esper 2 was frustrating... in a good way. Challenging. However, in some places it was also frustrating in a bad way. Setting objects down gently is infuriating using the oculus go remote - there's an elusive spot i can't feel or see that does it. Also, sometimes objects disappear when I try to transport them between rooms. Most irritating is that some levels will not reload properly if I stuff up. There is a particular level in chapter 4 where reloading makes one of the balls disappear and I have to go to chapter select and start that chapter again. I really liked the game but it's not perfect.
Love it nothing to hate 💕
This game is consistantly crashing at the same point. Such a shame because its really fun to play!

Why? Well I would like to play the first game, that won't start, and coatsink seems to refuse fixing this issue. I want to make you guys aware of the fact that I paid for both games. 

You know since October that your app is not working and you don't take if oof the store nor fix it.

Fraudulent!

developer_response.body: Hi TheBoeBoeBoe, sorry for the issues you have had with the first game. The problem has been identified and a patch is being worked on, thank you for your patience.

reviews.review_description: good for everyobe.Nice puzzles and graphics

reviews.review_title: Would be 5 stars but too glitchy
reviews.review_description: It’s such a shame. This could be one of my favorite games if the balls didn’t either keep going to a place you can access them, so you have to restart the room, or you restart the room and one of the balls vanishes and the other won’t move (happened each time now in the spacey area). FIX THIS because I’d love to keep playing without having a glitch keep me from continuing on with the game! It’s such a shame because great actors (Shaun of the Dead) are involved and such creative puzzles (having to look away and then back, no spoilers, but it’s super cool) have been created that utilize VR to its smart potential. I recommend the game, but be aware that there are these pitfalls that make me clench my teeth and also the controller isn’t very responsive.

I really enjoy the new graphics and story in this version, and there is a cool variety of settings and tasks.  I took off a star because of two controller issues. 1. There has been 2 or 3 scenes where the the ball has rolled behind/under items and there is only about 1/4, of the desired item visible, it is then impossible to pick up. And trying to get the items to move through the air FORWARD is almost impossible.
I get kicked to the Oculus main menu when I try to place the first block on the pad. Can't get past the first obstacle because the game freezes

reviews.review_title: I'd love to see more like this!
reviews.review_description: Really fun, challenging for me and not over in 20 minutes.  Waiting for the next one!

reviews.review_title: A great puzzler with the humor of Portal
reviews.review_description: Interesting puzzles and fun humor. Worth the price.
The game is fun until a ball gets stuck. Can't pick up the ball or reset the room. I found out restarting the chapter will fix the stuck ball. If this was fixed easily 5 stars. Also a little short
